author: anon-581fd578
content:
Root causes:

1. NAVIGATION: build_widget_tree creates a new scope every frame, destroying all signals. Router creates fresh current_path=/ each rebuild. Fix: persist router path in thread_local so it survives scope recreation.

2. APPEARANCE: Nav buttons use same background as toolbar (invisible). Divider uses LIGHT_GRAY on dark bg (invisible). No visual depth. Fix: better button styling, dark-aware divider, visual polish.

3. TEXT: Glyph y-position uses line_y from cosmic-text which is the line top, but the bearing.top offset may over-correct. Fix: tune the bearing calculation.
